drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Headwall sells hyperspectral imaging cameras and flight-ready sensor payloads for drones and aircraft. Their 'Airborne Hyperspectral Payloads' and 'Turnkey Drone and Payload Packages' suggest some subsystem-level integration, but the core product line is cameras/sensors. Classified as component_supplier; the skipped airborne payloads page would clarify whether they sell complete integrated payload pods (which would indicate subsystem_supplier).

No NDAA 848/889 or Blue UAS compliance claims found on the site

fetch_requests.reason: Primary drone-relevant product page; would list specific airborne payload SKUs, confirm whether products are complete payload pods (supporting subsystem_supplier) or sensors (supporting component_supplier), and may have NDAA/compliance claims for defense customers.

tagline: Manufactures hyperspectral imaging cameras and airborne sensor payloads (VNIR, SWIR, UV ranges) plus turnkey drone packages for remote sensing and industrial inspection. Production-ready systems span benchtop to airborne platforms. NDAA compliance status and specific defense/UAS program lineage not publicly confirmed; limited public evidence of formal qualification or contract awards in unmanned-systems supply chains.
